privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Acosta network simulation. The required output files (VSS file 'speed_zone.add.xml', modified config 'run_modified.sumocfg', baseline tripinfo 'baseline_tripinfo.xml', modified tripinfo 'modified_tripinfo.xml', and the report 'impact_report.txt') must be saved in the '/home/ga/SUMO_Output' directory. The agent modifies the road network by defining a 30 km/h traffic calming zone using a Variable Speed Sign. The baseline simulation without any modifications yields 8779 total trips with an average duration of 276.18 seconds.
